//: Lighthouse CI configuration for AnySkill PWA. Auto-runs in CI on every push to master/staging — see .github/workflows/ci.yml `lighthouse` job. Catches performance, accessibility, SEO, and best-practices regressions before deploy.
//budgets: Initial budgets are intentionally LENIENT. Flutter Web is heavy (canvaskit ~24MB), so perf scores around 30-50 are normal. Tighten over time as we optimize.

settings.//desktopPreset: desktop is more forgiving for Flutter Web than mobile (mobile = thermal throttling sim + slow CPU emulation)

assertions.//: Lower thresholds = warning. Higher = error. Tighten as we improve.
assertions.//hardErrors: These are catastrophic regressions — fail the build:
assertions.//offNotes: is-on-https/uses-https are off because we serve over localhost in CI. They will pass on the actual deploy.

upload.//: Use temporary public storage so reports are visible from PR comments without requiring our own LHCI server. Reports auto-delete after 7 days.
